purpose: Define the maturity ladder used to measure fidelity of conveyor runs and user-facing projections.

levels.name: Disposable Projection
levels.insufficientByItself: fidelity or drift may not be fully proven

levels.name: Governed Fidelity
levels.proves: freshness, receipts, gates, and equivalence exist

levels.name: Compiler-Grade Evolution
levels.proves: system can refactor, regenerate, and evolve with evidence

completionPosture: The catalog is the shared vocabulary for claiming and proving fidelity maturity.
